text.title: Quality Gates and Confidence Checks Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Quality Gates and Confidence Checks.

example.scenario: F-066 wave promotes a methodology batch. L1=lint (auto), L2=schema validators, L5=human review, L6=user sign-off. Threshold 0.8. L5 confidence = 0.6 → escalation path = 'request second reviewer'.
